title: Implement forwarding buffer with backpressure (C/Zephyr)
description:
Add per-source forwarding buffer to C subsystem (lichen/subsys/lichen/l2 or routing):
- Track packets per source IID (MAX_FORWARDING_SOURCES=8, MAX_PACKETS_PER_SOURCE=2)
- Return -ENOBUFS when limit exceeded
- Send NACK upstream when full (spec appendix-bufferbloat.md)
close_reason: Implemented: Per-source forwarding buffer in routing/router.c with configurable MAX_FORWARDING_SOURCES (8) and MAX_PACKETS_PER_SOURCE (2). Returns -ENOBUFS when limit exceeded, tracks nacks_sent counter for caller to send NACK upstream. Added Kconfig options, header declarations, and Zephyr tests in lichen/tests/routing_fwd_buffer/.
